themes.label: Kingdom

Commentary leans on "Even men, and women, and children, and the king's daughters —The comprehensive list emphasize...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "So Johanan the son of Kareah, and all the captains of the forces, and all the people, obeyed...". Word-study detail reinforces "שָׁמַע֩: obeyed - to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc....".

4: So Johanan the son of Kareah and all the commanders of the forces and all the people disobeyed the voice of the Lord [which told them] to stay in the land of Judah
